items.title: Right-wing Sanae Takaichi set to be Japan's first female premier | REUTERS
items.author: Reuters
items.content:
<article>Sanae Takaichi came out top in a male-dominated race to lead Japan's ruling party, putting her on course to emulate her hero, former British leader Margaret Thatcher, and become her country's first female prime minister .

#japan #politics #government #News #Reuters #Newsfeed

items.content:

items.title: Hamas on ceasefire, Comey “perp walk” and Japan’s likely first female PM
items.author: Reuters
items.content:
<article>Hamas agrees to key points in Trump’s proposed Gaza peace plan, which includes a ceasefire and prisoner exchange. An FBI agent is relieved of duty after refusing to participate in the "perp walk" of former FBI director James Comey. Sean “Diddy” Combs is sentenced. Sanae Takaichi is elected leader of Japan’s ruling party, positioning her to become the country’s first female prime minister. And AI-generated “Tilly Norwood” sparks backlash from Hollywood.



On the latest episode of On Assignment (https://www.reuters.com/podcasts/federal-workers-under-attack-2025-10-04/) : Our reports expose harassment of federal workers by a group linked to Trump.



Sign up for the Reuters Econ World newsletter ⁠here⁠ (https://www.reuters.com/newsletters/reuters-econ-world/) . 



Listen to the Reuters Econ World podcast ⁠here⁠ (https://nam02.safelinks.protection.outlook.com/?url=https%3A%2F%2Flink.chtbl.com%2FAbxd8GDx&data=05%7C02%7CGayle.Issa%40thomsonreuters.com%7Cdeedd17f603f4b360c6d08dd887d4c6f%7C62ccb8646a1a4b5d8e1c397dec1a8258%7C0%7C0%7C638816793925825661%7CUnknown%7CTWFpbGZsb3d8eyJFbXB0eU1hcGkiOnRydWUsIlYiOiIwLjAuMDAwMCIsIlAiOiJXaW4zMiIsIkFOIjoiTWFpbCIsIldUIjoyfQ%3D%3D%7C0%7C%7C%7C&sdata=IMNQNODuIb47FCT8slHrDm44gzMUrcqH53c1Od8ryB4%3D&reserved=0) .

items.title: Rubik's inventor and chess grandmaster debut 'Rubik Chess' contest | REUTERS
items.author: Reuters
items.content:
<article>The inventor of the Rubik's Cube, Erno Rubik, and Hungarian grand chess master Judit Polgar launched the first tournament of their joint game called “Rubik Chess” in Budapest, in what Rubik says he hoped would remind people 'how to use our hands and minds.’

#rubikchess #ernorubik #juditpolgar #chess #rubikscube #News #Reuters #Newsfeed
